zh.lifeSummary: 當John Devereaux於1335年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾丁頓時，他的父親Sir John I Devereux33歲，母親Margaret Barre29歲。他於1377年與Margaret de Vere結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1367年登記服兵役。他於1376年在英國被列為sir knight。他去世於1393年2月22日在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Devereaux于1335年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾丁頓时，他的父亲Sir John I Devereux33岁，母亲Margaret Barre29岁。他于1377年与Margaret de Vere结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1367年登记服兵役。他于1376年在英国被列为sir knight。他去世于1393年2月22日在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Devereaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devereux
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Devereaux was born in 1335, in Dinton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John I Devereux, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Barre, was 29. He married Margaret de Vere in 1377. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1367. In 1376, his occupation is listed as sir knight in England. He died on 22 February 1393, in City of London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in City of London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Devereaux est né en 1335, à Dinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John I Devereux, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Barre, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Vere en 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1367. En 1376, sa profession de son indiquée est sir knight à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 22 février 1393, à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Devereaux 1335 in Dinton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John I Devereux 33 und seine Mutter Margaret Barre 29. Er hat 1377 Margaret de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1367 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1376 ist sein Beruf als sir knight in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Februar 1393 im Alter von 58 Jahren in City of London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in City of London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret de Vere nel 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1367. Nel 1376, la sua occupazione è indicata come sir knight nel England. Morì il 22 febbraio 1393, nel City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Devereauxが1335年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアディントンで生まれた時，父Sir John I Devereuxは33歳，母Margaret Barreは29歳であった。1377年にMargaret de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年に兵役登録をした。1376年，イギリスでの職業はsir knightと記録されている。彼は1393年2月22日にイギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Devereaux(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 딘턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I Devereux(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Barre(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1377년 Margaret de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1376년, 그의 직업은 영국에서 sir knight이었다. 그는 1393년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Devereaux nasceu em 1335, em Dinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John I Devereux, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Barre, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Vere em 1377. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1367. Em 1376, sua profissão aparece como sir knight em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1393, em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Devereaux родился в 1335 г. в местности динтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John I Devereux было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Barre, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Vere в 1377 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1367 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1376 годуработал по профессии sir knight в местности Англия. Он умер 22 февраля 1393 г. в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Devereaux nació en 1335, en Dinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John I Devereux, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Barre, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret de Vere en 1377. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1367. En 1376, su ocupación registrada era sir knight en Inglaterra. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1393, en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
